name: Img2Silk
description: KiCad plugin for importing images as PCB graphics.
description_full: Import and convert images to silkscreen, copper, or solder mask layers directly in KiCad, no external tools required. Choose from five algorithms (Atkinson, Bayer 8×8, Floyd–Steinberg, and Random dithering for photos and gradients, or Threshold for logos and line art), fine-tune size, threshold, and dot size, and see a live preview before placing.
